generated_exposure.exposure_text: Retired General (30 yrs service) here. The alliance commitment debate misses the point. Our partners aren't pulling their weight? That's exactly why we need to STRENGTHEN our commitments. When allies see we're committed, they step up. When they see hesitation, they look for other options. We've seen this pattern for decades. The alternative to strong alliances isn't 'saving money' - it's being left to handle threats alone. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
